fields.name: ID
fields.tooltip: Specifies the ID that applies to the cost allocation.

fields.name: Line No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of this line.

fields.name: Target Cost Type
fields.tooltip: Specifies the type of target cost.

fields.name: Target Cost Center
fields.tooltip: Specifies the target cost center.

fields.name: Target Cost Object
fields.tooltip: Specifies the target cost object.

fields.name: Static Base
fields.tooltip: Specifies whether or not the base is static.

fields.name: Static Weighting
fields.tooltip: Specifies whether the values in the static base are weighted.

fields.name: Share
fields.tooltip: Specifies the values calculated from the Static Base and Static Weighting fields.

fields.name: Percent
fields.tooltip: Specifies the percentage rate calculated based on all other allocation targets.

fields.name: Comment
fields.tooltip: Specifies a comment that applies to the cost allocation.

fields.name: Base
fields.tooltip: Specifies whether or not the base is static.

fields.name: No. Filter
fields.tooltip: Specifies a filter for the numbers that are included.

fields.name: Cost Center Filter
fields.tooltip: Specifies the cost center code. The code serves as a default value for cost posting that is captured later in the cost journal.

fields.name: Cost Object Filter
fields.tooltip: Specifies the cost object code. The code serves as a default value for cost posting that is captured later in the cost journal.

fields.name: Date Filter Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies a filter to filter the calculation of the dynamic allocation base by dates. You use the Date Filter Code field to define a dynamic date range without using a static date. If the allocation bases are updated, the date filter is automatically updated by using the work date.

fields.name: Group Filter
fields.tooltip: Specifies a filter so that the dynamic calculation of the Share field is based on the chosen group. Leave the field blank for static allocation.

fields.name: Allocation Target Type
fields.tooltip: Specifies if the allocation comes from both budgeted and actual costs, only budgeted costs, or only actual costs.

fields.name: Percent per Share
fields.tooltip: Specifies the percentage if the chosen Allocation Target Type is Percent per Share.

fields.name: Amount per Share
fields.tooltip: Specifies the amount if the value in the Allocation Target Type field is Amount per Share.

fields.name: Share Updated on
fields.tooltip: Specifies the date of when the Share field was last updated.

fields.name: Last Date Modified
fields.tooltip: Specifies when the allocation target card was last modified.

fields.name: User ID
fields.tooltip: Specifies the ID of the user who posted the entry, to be used, for example, in the change log.
